comment: Baseline model for the Covered Vacuum Pipe. The chunk-mesh path swaps this out at bake time (NeoForgeClientSetup.onModifyBakingResult) for CoveredPipeBakedModel, which delegates to the wrapped camo block's quads and appends the indicator overlay below. This file still ships - it controls the breaking-particle texture, the inventory icon's fallback, and any code that bypasses the dynamic-model swap.
